message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle bold
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #333333
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8
skinparam classHeaderBorderColor #333333
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 14
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle normal
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodFontStyle normal
skinparam classMethodFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodColor #006600
skinparam classAttributeColor #CC0000
skinparam classInterfaceBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam classInterfaceBorderColor #333333
skinparam classInterfaceFontStyle italic
skinparam classInterfaceHeaderBackgroundColor #D8D8F0
skinparam classInterfaceHeaderBorderColor #333333
skinparam classInterfaceHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classInterfaceHeaderFontSize 14
skinparam classInterfaceAttributeFontStyle normal
skinparam classInterfaceAttributeFontSize 12
skinparam classInterfaceAttributeColor #CC0000
skinparam classInterfaceMethodFontStyle normal
skinparam classInterfaceMethodFontSize 12
skinparam classInterfaceMethodColor #006600
skinparam classIconSize 20
skinparam classIconColor #006600
skinparam classInterfaceIconColor #6600CC

class DataAnalysisCLI {
    + data: DataFrame
    + reader: KeyboardReader
    + DataAnalysisCLI()
    + run(): void
    + main(args: String[]): void
}

class DataFrame {
    + fileName: String
    + headerNames: String[]
    + numOfRows: int
    + numOfCols: int
    + csvData: double[][]
    + DataFrame(fileName: String)
    + toString(): String
    + getColumnByIndex(index: int): DataSeries
    + getHeaderNames(): String[]
    + getNumOfRows(): int
    + getNumOfCols(): int
}

class KeyboardReader {
    + reader: BufferedReader
    + KeyboardReader()
    + getKeyboardInput(): String
    + getKeyboardInteger(): int
    + getKeyboardDouble(): double
    + prompt(s: String): void
    + display(s: String): void
    - readKeyboard(): String
}

class DataSeries {
    + label: String
    + data: double[]
    + count: int
    + DataSeries(label: String)
    + size(): int
    + add(val: double): void
    + getMin(): double
    + getMax(): double
    + getSum(): double
    + getMean(): double
    + toString(): String
}

interface IBasicStats {
    + getMin(): double
    + getMax(): double
    + getSum(): double
    + getMean(): double
}

DataAnalysisCLI "1" *-- "1" DataFrame
DataAnalysisCLI "1" *-- "1" KeyboardReader
DataFrame "1" *-- "1" DataSeries
DataSeries ..|> IBasicStats

@enduml
